theme: paper snowflake from folds and one cut
title: Fold-and-Cut Snowflake: Orbit-Aware Hole Design
strategies: single generic mark: reproduces the checker's own trivial reference construction
single-blob greedy: BFS-grow one connected cut region from a fixed seed until its mirrored images hit the 1/3 area target, ignoring the fold axes entirely

orbit-aware multi-motif: place several pairwise-incongruent small cut motifs each kept at a safe clearance from every reflection/rotation axis of the fold group, so their orbits stay disjoint and each contributes a distinct hole shape, then top up area with repeats
invalid: claims more cut marks than the stated budget allows
